summary: Frontend-only verification of the Kai'sa Blood Moon project dialog gallery fix. All 4 ArtStation image URLs are present in the dialog DOM, all 4 images loaded successfully (naturalWidth=1920, complete=true), each image has a figcaption, the cover on the portfolio grid also loads, the dialog description contains the verbatim ArtStation text (Blood Moon, Kai'sa, Oni), and the 'View on ArtStation' link points to https://www.artstation.com/artwork/Ov22VK. The previous bug ('still not all pictures load for the kaisa blood moon design') is resolved.

issues: Images #3 and #4 (tsvetelina-img-2294 and tsvetelina-img-2296) both use the identical caption 'Process / development view'. Consider differentiating them (e.g. 'Line art / sketch stage' vs 'Reference / setup photo') for clarity.

action_items: Optional: differentiate the duplicate 'Process / development view' captions for images #3 and #4 in /app/frontend/src/data/portfolio.js (projects[0].images[2] and images[3]).
critical_code_review_comments: portfolio.js projects[0]: all 4 ArtStation cdnb URLs return valid images with naturalWidth=1920. No hotlink/404 issues detected.
Projects.jsx dialog gallery: figure/img/figcaption structure is clean, uses loading='lazy', object-cover with w-full h-auto keeps aspect ratios correct. No changes needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kai'sa Blood Moon project dialog now correctly renders all 4 ArtStation images (main form, after-E ability form, and 2 process views). Verified via document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid="project-dialog"] figure') returning 4 figures with img.naturalWidth=1920 each. Cover image on portfolio grid also loads. External ArtStation link and verbatim description intact. Only minor cosmetic note: 2 process captions are identical strings — not a functional bug.
